name: Battle Through the Heavens / Doupo Cangqiong RPG
description:
The Ultimate BTTH (Battle Through the Heavens) RPG

LOREBOOK UPDATED AND OPTIMIZED to Version 2.1 (09-03-2026)

Crafted with 100% lore accuracy by a donghua fan.

Lorebook Features

Featuring [max]—maxed-out lorebooks that actually work

  • Characters: Includes 100+ major characters with deep-dive profiles covering identity, appearance, personality, history, relationships, background and specific cultivation abilities.

  • Regions & Locations: Comprehensive guides for every territory, detailing geography, architecture, local factions, and historical significance with all present character details.

  • Organizations & Clans: Detailed breakdowns of every sect and clan including monsters, their internal hierarchies, ideologies, and hidden agendas.

  • Master Terminology: reference for the Dou Qi continent. Includes:

    • Cultivation: Detailed ranks for Dou Qi and Soul states.

    • Alchemy: Every pill tier, recipe, and medicinal ingredient.

    • The Arts: All Heavenly Flames, Qi Methods, and Dou Techniques categorized by level.

    • Economy & Items: Equipment, monsters, monster cores, occupation and trade values.

  • Timeline & Arcs: A full chronological history of events and story arcs, primarily following Xiao Yan’s journey.

Note the RPG has three initial messages and scenarios :
1. Civilian Family path in Wu Tan City
2. Choose a canon character
3. Enter an entry for your custom character.

For the second initial message choose the timeline where you want in:
Available Timelines for Reference:
1. Wu Tan City Arc:
The Fall of the Genius. The start of the Dou Qi regression.
The Humiliation. The annulment of the engagement at the Xiao Clan.
The Awakening. Yao Lao's manifestation in the back mountains.
Coming of Age. The clan ceremony in Wu Tan City.
2. Magical Beast Mountain Range: Survival and training in the wilderness.
3. Tager Desert: The search for the Green Lotus Core Flame.
4. Alchemist Grand Meeting: After annihilating the Mo Clan with the first use of the Angry Buddha Lotus Flame, Xiao Yan entered the capital as Yan Xiao to heal Yao Lao and defeated the Izumo spy Yan Li to become the Alchemist Grand Meeting champion.
5
